data.title: Gold surges to doorstep of $5,000 as experts debate bitcoin's underperformance
data.description:
Gold has made a remarkable surge, approaching the significant milestone of $5,000 per ounce, while experts and analysts engage in a lively debate regarding the underperformance of bitcoin in the current market landscape.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/01/22/gold-surges-to-doorstep-of-usd5-000-as-experts-debate-bitcoin-s-underperformance

data.title: Stablecoin supply growth stalls as regulation, Treasury yields bite
data.description:
Institutional compliance costs and higher Treasury yields are reshaping stablecoin issuance as growth shifts from rapid expansion to balance-sheet discipline.

data.title: Crypto Market Shows Early Stabilization Signals in January
data.description:
As of Jan. 21, the broader crypto market is showing early signs of stabilization following weeks of pressure. While price action remains range-bound across major assets, multiple indicators suggest selling intensity has eased. Indeed, a short-term balance is forming between buyers and sellers
source: https://www.techgaged.com/crypto-market-shows-early-stabilization-signals-in-january/

data.title: Bitcoin faces its biggest risk yet! U.S. Treasury sell-off sparks ‘Capital War’
data.description:

source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-faces-its-biggest-risk-yet-u-s-treasury-sell-off-sparks-capital-war/

data.title: New Proposal Envisions Base Token With Direct Voting Power Over Coinbase
data.description:
An influential proposal published by CoinDesk has reignited debate around a potential Base network token, arguing that a future asset, often referred to by speculators as BASE, could be structured to give holders direct voting power over Coinbase Global, Inc. itself.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/new-proposal-envisions-base-token-with-direct-voting-power-over-coinbase/

data.title: Dollar Index Experiences Significant Drop
data.description: The dollar index (DXY) has seen a notable decline, with a drop of over 0.5% during the day, currently standing at 98.3. According to ChainCatcher, this movement in the dollar index reflects ongoing fluctuations in the currency market. The index, which measures the value of the U.S. dollar against a basket of foreign currencies, is closely watched by investors and analysts for indications of economic trends and potential impacts on global trade.

data.title: Trump Sues JPMorgan And CEO Dimon For $5Bn
data.description:
President Donald Trump sued JPMorgan Chase and its CEO, Jamie Dimon, for at least $5 billion over allegations that the lender stopped offering him and his businesses banking services for political reasons.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/financials/trump-sues-jpmorgan-and-ceo-dimon-for-5bn/

data.title: AI startups command sky-high prices as investors FOMO kicks in
data.description:
Artificial intelligence companies are seeing their price tags shoot through the roof as investment firms scramble not to miss the next breakthrough technology, according to Orlando Bravo. Orlando Bravo, a top private equity leader who started the private equity firm Thoma Bravo, says venture capital companies are jumping into anything related to AI without much […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ai-startups-command-sky-high-prices-as-investors-fomo-kicks-in/

data.description:

data.title: Crypto Social Buzz Hits One-Year High as Bitcoin Lags Gold and Silver
data.description:
Crypto market discussions have surged to their highest level in a year, even as price performance over the same period has favored traditional precious metals over digital assets, according to new data shared by Santiment.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-social-buzz-hits-one-year-high-as-bitcoin-lags-gold-and-silver/

data.description:
The developer called the sale “de-risking,” saying he sold ahead of vesting to avoid discounted OTC exits.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/ai-meme-coin-ralph-crashes-80-after-300k-dev-selloff/

data.title: Crypto Fundamentals Hit Records in Q4 2025 as Prices Lagged
data.description:
Crypto markets ended 2025 with a paradox: prices declined while usage metrics surged to all-time highs. Bitwise’s latest research data show ETH dropped 29% in Q4 2025, even as Ethereum transactions reached new peaks. The asset manager’s CIO, Matt Hougan, noted that this disconnect has appeared before at major inflection points. Markets often bottom when participants […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-metrics-hit-records-in-q4-2025-as-prices-kept-lagging/

data.title: South Korean Prosecutors Probe Disappearance of Seized Bitcoin After Phishing Breach
data.description:
Reports have emerged that the Gwangju District Prosecutors’ Office is investigating the disappearance of a significant amount of Bitcoin that had been seized as part of a criminal case, raising serious concerns about how the state safeguards digital assets once they fall under government custody.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-korean-prosecutors-probe-disappearance-of-seized-bitcoin-after-phishing-breach/
